CMake toolchain file for building on Linux with ARMv7l architecture using GCC.

# Purpose
This configuration file is used to set up the build environment for a software project targeting an ARM architecture on a Linux system. It specifies the system name as `Linux` and the processor architecture as `armv7l-el`. The file sets the C compiler to `arm-linux-gnueabi-gcc`, which is a cross-compiler for ARM architecture. Additionally, it defines common architecture-specific flags under `FLAGS_COMMON_ARCH`, which include `-mlittle-endian` and `-mthumb`, to ensure the generated code is little-endian and uses the Thumb instruction set.
